title: type
summary: Link relation type "type": Refers to a resource identifying the abstract semantic type of which the link's context is considered to be an instance. Defined in RFC6903.
source_version: IANA registry, Last-Modified: Mon, 12 Jan 2026 18:11:26 GMT
